promotion_rules.rule: reusable signal observed and initial quality score reaches 30
quality score reaches 60 with usable verification evidence
quality score reaches 75 and success evidence is stable
quality score reaches 90, success rate remains high, stability period passes, and user confirmation is required

elimination_rules.rule: expire after retention window, originally 180 days
direct elimination after three consecutive failures below success threshold
enter observation after repeated low success; replacement search before retirement
enter longer observation and user-visible review after degraded performance
no automatic elimination; user decision required

evolution_operations.name: CAPTURED
evolution_operations.meaning: new asset extracted from successful high-quality execution when similarity with existing assets is low

evolution_operations.name: DERIVED
evolution_operations.meaning: child asset created from a parent asset for a different scenario

evolution_operations.name: FIX
evolution_operations.meaning: degraded asset repaired in sandbox and versioned after validation

current_implementation_notes: backend/src/domain/asset_manager.ts implements tiering, quality scoring, usage updates, lifecycle evaluation, promotion checks, quick elimination, and ROI calculation.
backend/app/m07/asset_system.py implements a DPBS operational asset path with governance-mediated promotion/binding.
backend/packages/harness/deerflow/assets/* implements another asset path with prompt, experience, memory, and review concepts.
Runtime evidence confirms partial asset paths, not a single fully unified A1-A9 lifecycle.
